allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('has initializer:', 'initializer' in d\); print\('methods order:', [m['name'] for m in d.get\('methods',[]\)]\); print\('events entries:', len\(d.get\('events',{}\).get\('entries',[]\)\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); ev=d.get\('events',{}\); print\('methods:', [m['name'] for m in d.get\('methods',[]\)]\); print\('events keys:', list\(ev.keys\(\)\)\); print\('isGeneric:', ev.get\('isGeneric'\)\); print\('emitterMethods:', [m['name'] for m in ev.get\('emitterMethods',[]\)]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); ev=d.get\('events',{}\); print\('methods count:', len\(d.get\('methods',[]\)\)\); print\('events keys:', list\(ev.keys\(\)\)\); print\('emitterMethods:', [m['name'] for m in ev.get\('emitterMethods',[]\)]\); print\('entries count:', len\(ev.get\('entries',[]\)\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('class desc:', d.get\('description', '—'\)\); print\('props:'\); [print\(' ', p['name'], '=>', p.get\('description', '\(no desc\)'\)\) for p in d.get\('properties',[]\)]; print\('methods:'\); [print\(' ', m['name'], '=>', \(m.get\('description', '\(no desc\)'\) or ''\)[:60]\) for m in d.get\('methods',[]\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('class:', d['description'][:120]\); print\('ctx:', next\(p['description'] for p in d['properties'] if p['name']=='ctx'\)\)")
